proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_tamoxifen.
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have a higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_palbociclib.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_trastuzumab.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a different mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.723 on tamoxifen vs 4.680 off; difference +0.043 mo, Welch t-test p=0.077.
Mean pfs_months 5.408 on palbociclib vs 4.310 off; difference +1.098 mo, Welch t-test p<1e-300.
Mean pfs_months 4.645 on trastuzumab vs 4.705 off; difference -0.060 mo, p=0.029 (small but significant decrement, likely due to confounding by HER2-positive disease prognosis).
Mean pfs_months 4.660 on olaparib vs 4.696 off; difference -0.036 mo, p=0.330.
Mean pfs_months 4.686 on sacituzumab_govitecan vs 4.694 off; difference -0.007 mo, p=0.846.
Mean pfs_months 4.630 on pembrolizumab vs 4.704 off; difference -0.074 mo, p=0.018 (small significant decrement).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_tamoxifen x er_positive interaction on pfs_months: tamoxifen prolongs PFS more in ER-positive patients than in ER-negative patients.
There is a positive treatment_trastuzumab x her2_positive interaction on pfs_months: trastuzumab prolongs PFS more in HER2-positive patients than in HER2-negative patients.
There is a positive treatment_palbociclib x er_positive interaction on pfs_months: palbociclib prolongs PFS more in ER-positive patients than in ER-negative patients.
There is a positive treatment_olaparib x BRCA1/2-mutated (brca1_mutation OR brca2_mutation) interaction on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan x triple-negative (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0) interaction on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction term treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive = -0.058 (95% CI -0.16 to +0.05), p=0.270. No evidence of differential tamoxifen benefit by ER status.
Interaction term treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive = -0.028, p=0.695. HER2-positive patients have shorter PFS overall (-0.45 mo) but trastuzumab does not differentially benefit them.
Interaction treatment_palbociclib:er_positive = +1.594 (95% CI 1.50 to 1.69), p<1e-200. Palbociclib confers a large additional PFS benefit in ER-positive patients.
Interaction treatment_olaparib:brca = +0.402 (95% CI 0.06 to 0.74), p=0.021. Olaparib appears to confer additional PFS benefit specifically in BRCA1/2 carriers.
Interaction treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:tnbc = -0.105, p=0.246. No evidence of preferential sacituzumab benefit in triple-negative patients.
Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high = +0.217, p=0.466 (msi_high prevalence ~1%). No significant pembrolizumab x MSI-high interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter pfs_months than those with stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without brain metastases.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without liver metastases.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without bone metastases.
Patients with node_positive=1 have shorter pfs_months than node-negative patients.
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs 3.617 mo with stage_iv vs 5.153 mo without; difference -1.536 mo, p<1e-300. Stage IV is a strong adverse prognostic factor.
Mean pfs 3.750 mo with brain mets vs 4.800 mo without; difference -1.050 mo, p=1.5e-178.
Each one-point increase in ecog_ps decreases pfs_months by 1.180 (95% CI -1.21 to -1.15), p<1e-300.
Mean pfs 4.708 mo with liver mets vs 4.690 mo without; difference +0.018 mo, p=0.555. Surprisingly, liver_mets is NOT prognostic in this cohort.
Mean pfs 4.723 mo with bone mets vs 4.685 mo without; difference +0.038 mo, p=0.170. No prognostic effect.
Mean pfs 4.681 mo node-positive vs 4.705 mo node-negative; difference -0.024 mo, p=0.292. Node status not prognostic.
age_years coefficient = +0.176 mo per year (95% CI 0.174 to 0.177), p<1e-300. Direction is OPPOSITE to expectation: older patients have LONGER PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
er_positive=1 patients have longer pfs_months than ER-negative patients (main effect).
her2_positive=1 patients have shorter pfs_months than HER2-negative patients (main effect, before treatment adjustment).
sex_female=1 vs 0 patients differ in pfs_months.
postmenopausal=1 vs 0 patients differ in pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Each 1 g/dL higher albumin_g_dl associates with +0.499 mo PFS, p=9.4e-112.
ldh_u_l coefficient = -0.00053 per U/L, p=2.4e-04. Higher LDH associates with shorter PFS but effect size is small.
crp_mg_l coefficient = -0.00088 per mg/L, p=0.461. CRP not prognostic.
nlr coefficient = +0.0033 per unit, p=0.537. NLR not prognostic.
Each 1% weight loss in 6 months -0.0747 mo PFS, p=4.1e-148. Weight loss is a strong adverse prognostic marker.
alk phos coefficient = -0.00073 per U/L, p=0.0030. Modest negative association.
ER-positive associates with +0.568 mo PFS (95% CI 0.52 to 0.62), p<1e-100.
HER2-positive associates with -0.459 mo PFS (95% CI -0.52 to -0.40), p<1e-50.
sex_female coefficient = -0.013 mo, p=0.562. No PFS difference by sex (cohort is 44.7% female).
postmenopausal coefficient = -0.023 mo, p=0.310. No main-effect difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within HR-positive HER2-negative patients (er_positive=1 OR pr_positive=1; her2_positive=0), treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months than no palbociclib.
Within HR-positive HER2-negative patients, the palbociclib-vs-not difference in pfs_months is larger than in HR-negative or HER2-positive patients (interaction).
Within HER2-positive patients, treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no trastuzumab.
Within BRCA1/2-mutated patients, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than no olaparib.
Within ER-positive patients, treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months than no tamoxifen.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_palbociclib:hrpos_her2neg interaction = +1.820 (95% CI 1.73-1.91), p<1e-200. Stratified: in HR+/HER2- subgroup palbociclib +1.81 mo (5.408 vs 4.308, p<1e-300, n_on=10598); in non-HR+/HER2- palbociclib -0.009 mo (p=0.78).
Within HER2-positive (n=9060): mean pfs 4.254 on trastuzumab vs 4.334 off; difference -0.079 mo, p=0.153. Trastuzumab does NOT prolong PFS in HER2-positive subgroup.
Within BRCA1/2-mutated (n=2499): mean pfs 4.933 on olaparib vs 4.587 off; difference +0.346 mo, p=0.041. Modest evidence of olaparib benefit.
Within ER-positive (n=34886): mean pfs 4.881 on tamoxifen vs 4.858 off; difference +0.023 mo, p=0.450. Tamoxifen does NOT prolong PFS in ER-positive patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan x her2_low interaction on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan x HR-negative (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0) interaction on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab x triple-negative interaction on pfs_months.
There is a treatment_pembrolizumab x stage_iv interaction on pfs_months (different effect by stage).
There is a positive treatment_trastuzumab x her2_amplification interaction on pfs_months.
pik3ca_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than pik3ca_mutation=0 (main effect).
There is a negative treatment_palbociclib x pik3ca_mutation interaction on pfs_months: palbociclib benefit is reduced or absent in PIK3CA-mutated tumors.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low = -0.038, p=0.626. No differential sacituzumab benefit by HER2-low.
Interaction sacituzumab_govitecan:hr_neg = -0.035, p=0.679. Sacituzumab does not preferentially benefit HR-negative patients.
Interaction pembrolizumab:tnbc = +0.185 (95% CI 0.04-0.34), p=0.015. Modest positive interaction: pembrolizumab is less harmful (or weakly beneficial) in triple-negative subgroup.
Interaction pembrolizumab:stage_iv = +0.059, p=0.366. No interaction with stage.
Interaction trastuzumab:her2_amplification = +0.039, p=0.814 (her2_amplification prevalence 2.9%). No detectable interaction.
pik3ca_mutation associates with -0.559 mo PFS, p=2.5e-126. PIK3CA-mutated tumors have shorter PFS overall.
Interaction palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation = -1.623 (95% CI -1.72 to -1.53), p<1e-200. Palbociclib's PFS benefit is essentially abolished in PIK3CA-mutated tumors.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within HR-positive HER2-negative patients with pik3ca_mutation=0, treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months than no palbociclib.
Within HR-positive HER2-negative patients with pik3ca_mutation=1, treatment_palbociclib does NOT improve pfs_months.

There is a three-way interaction treatment_palbociclib x hrpos_her2neg x pik3ca_mutation on pfs_months: palbociclib benefit is largest in HR+/HER2- AND PIK3CA wild-type, and is canceled by PIK3CA mutation.
There is a treatment_tamoxifen x postmenopausal interaction on pfs_months.
Within ER-positive premenopausal patients, treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months than no tamoxifen.

analyses.result_summary: n_on=6987, mean_on=7.038; n_off=12931, mean_off=4.297; diff=+2.740 mo, p<1e-300. Largest treatment effect observed in dataset.
n_on=3611, mean_on=4.342; n_off=6915, mean_off=4.327; diff=+0.015 mo, p=0.733. No palbociclib benefit when PIK3CA is mutated.

Three-way interaction coefficient = -2.845 (95% CI -3.03 to -2.66), p<1e-200. Palbociclib:hrpos_her2neg main interaction = +2.791 (p<1e-200). Together this confirms palbociclib benefit is restricted to HR+/HER2- AND PIK3CA wild-type.
Interaction tamoxifen:postmenopausal = -0.043, p=0.392. No interaction by menopausal status.
n_on=4191, mean_on=4.921; n_off=9614, mean_off=4.877; diff=+0.044 mo, p=0.377. Tamoxifen benefit absent even in ER+ premenopausal subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the 24 candidate SNPs is associated with pfs_months at uncorrected p<0.05.
Patients of different race_ethnicity groups have different mean pfs_months.
Patients of different insurance_type groups have different mean pfs_months.
rural_residence=1 patients have different pfs_months than rural_residence=0 patients.
Higher education_years is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Of 24 SNPs tested, only snp_rs1801131 reaches p<0.05 (mean diff -0.054 mo, p=0.025) — not significant after Bonferroni (alpha 0.05/24=0.002). All other SNP p-values >=0.08. No robust SNP association detected.
ANOVA F=0.85, p=0.494. Mean pfs_months ranges only 4.68 (white) to 4.76 (other). No race/ethnicity differences in PFS.
ANOVA F=0.31, p=0.818. Mean pfs ranges 4.68 (private) to 4.73 (uninsured). No insurance differences.
Mean pfs 4.714 rural vs 4.688 non-rural; diff=+0.027 mo, p=0.343. No effect.
education_years coefficient = -0.0032 mo/year, p=0.388. No effect.
smoking_pack_years coefficient = -0.00029 mo/pack-year, p=0.479. No effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable linear regression of pfs_months on age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, er_positive, pr_positive, her2_positive, pik3ca_mutation, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, treatments and pre-specified interactions, the treatment_palbociclib:hrpos_her2neg interaction remains positive and significant.
In the same multivariable model, the treatment_palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation interaction remains negative and significant.
In the same multivariable model, the treatment_olaparib:brca interaction remains positive and significant after adjustment.
In the same multivariable model, the treatment_pembrolizumab:tnbc interaction remains positive after adjustment.
In the same multivariable model, weight_loss_pct_6mo, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets remain independently associated with shorter pfs_months and albumin_g_dl with longer pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, treatment_tamoxifen, treatment_trastuzumab, and treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan main effects remain non-significant.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient = +1.728 (95% CI 1.69-1.76), p<1e-300. Confirmed.
Adjusted coefficient = -1.652 (95% CI -1.69 to -1.61), p<1e-300. Confirmed.

Adjusted coefficient = -0.019 (95% CI -0.15 to +0.11), p=0.776. After adjustment, the BRCA-specific olaparib effect disappears, suggesting prior signal was confounded by patient mix or driven by sampling variation.
Adjusted coefficient = +0.105 (95% CI 0.045-0.165), p=0.001. Holds up in adjusted model — pembrolizumab is less unfavorable / mildly favorable in TNBC.

weight_loss_pct_6mo -0.076 (p<1e-300), ecog_ps -1.175 (p<1e-300), stage_iv -1.546 (p<1e-300), has_brain_mets -0.969 (p<1e-300), albumin_g_dl +0.476 (p<1e-300), ldh_u_l -5.3e-4 (p<1e-15), age_years +0.176 (p<1e-300). All confirmed.
treatment_tamoxifen +0.005 (p=0.65), treatment_trastuzumab -0.015 (p=0.18), treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan +0.015 (p=0.31). All non-significant after adjustment. R-squared 0.835, n=50000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade, pain_nrs, dyspnea_grade, cough_grade, or appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease, heart_failure, interstitial_lung_disease_history, copd, diabetes_mellitus, autoimmune_disease, or hiv_positive have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Within brca1_mutation=1 only, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than no olaparib (and similarly for brca2_mutation alone).
Within triple-negative patients only, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Mean pfs_months differs between sex_female=1 and sex_female=0 patients within this breast-cancer cohort.

analyses.code: loop OLS for each symptom grade
analyses.result_summary: fatigue_grade beta=+0.0005 (p=0.96), pain_nrs -0.0015 (p=0.72), dyspnea_grade +0.010 (p=0.30), cough_grade -0.009 (p=0.38), appetite_loss_grade -0.0018 (p=0.86). None of the symptom grades is associated with PFS.
All comorbidity-PFS p-values 0.36-0.82 (CKD p=0.64, HF p=0.67, ILD p=0.82, COPD p=0.61, DM p=0.41, autoimmune p=0.38, HIV p=0.36). Effect sizes |diff|<=0.10 mo. No comorbidity is associated with PFS.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind within BRCA1+ only and BRCA2+ only
analyses.result_summary: BRCA1+: n_on=120, mean_on=5.030 vs n_off=1157, mean_off=4.632, diff=+0.398 mo, p=0.117. BRCA2+: n_on=119, mean_on=4.835 vs n_off=1103, mean_off=4.540, diff=+0.295 mo, p=0.192. Numerical olaparib trend in both BRCA strata but neither significant alone, consistent with the borderline pooled BRCA result that disappears after adjustment.

TNBC subgroup: n_on=1578, mean_on=4.366 vs n_off=8918, mean_off=4.294, diff=+0.072 mo, p=0.222. The pembrolizumab x TNBC interaction signal is driven mostly by a slightly larger negative effect of pembrolizumab in non-TNBC patients (-0.114 mo, p=0.0017) rather than a clear positive effect in TNBC.
prior_lines_of_therapy coefficient = +0.0093 mo/line, p=0.343. No effect.

Mean pfs 4.686 (female) vs 4.699 (male); diff=-0.013 mo, p=0.562. No PFS difference. Note: cohort is only 44.7% female despite being labeled a breast-cancer dataset; treatment receipt rates also nearly identical between sexes.
